title: Context-assembly manifest (training-data-plan.md §3.6)
description: The FULL assembled input for one model invocation (not just evidence): system policy, skill text, tool schemas, prior summaries, compaction output, operator/QA messages, budget, prior failures — each an ordered component. rendered_prompt_hash + renderer_version + tokenizer_ref let the exact context be reconstructed and hash-verified (acceptance test 'Context replay'). Referenced from a decision via context_manifest_id. Standalone DOCUMENT, not an event.
